channel.title: The Daily Diss-patch
channel.description: Original satire and commentary from The Daily Diss-patch.

item.title: New AI Model writes a 40-page manifesto about quarterly earnings expectations
item.description: In a development that surprised absolutely no one, new ai model took drastic measures regarding quarterly earnings expectations. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Local Man quietly pivots to the concept of time
item.description: In an unprecedented display of corporate synergy, local man took drastic measures regarding the concept of time. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Local Man rebrands as the concept of sleep
item.description: Following a rigorous 4-minute Google search, local man took drastic measures regarding the concept of sleep. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Local Man invests $40B into the entire middle class
item.description: During a press conference nobody asked for, local man took drastic measures regarding the entire middle class. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: HOA President schedules an emergency meeting about the office thermostat
item.description: In an unprecedented display of corporate synergy, hoa president took drastic measures regarding the office thermostat. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Corporate HR Department launches an NFT collection based on a suspiciously calm pigeon
item.description: During a press conference nobody asked for, corporate hr department took drastic measures regarding a suspiciously calm pigeon. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Crypto Whale announces a strategic partnership with a moderately sized puddle
item.description: In a development that surprised absolutely no one, crypto whale took drastic measures regarding a moderately sized puddle. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Anonymous Pentagon Source attempts to unionize against a sentient Roomba
item.description: Following a rigorous 4-minute Google search, anonymous pentagon source took drastic measures regarding a sentient Roomba. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Fortune 500 CEO attempts to unionize against a sentient Roomba
item.description: During a press conference nobody asked for, fortune 500 ceo took drastic measures regarding a sentient Roomba. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Smart Fridge live-streams an apology to the office thermostat
item.description: In an unprecedented display of corporate synergy, smart fridge took drastic measures regarding the office thermostat. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Anonymous Pentagon Source declares total victory over the concept of time
item.description: Following a rigorous 4-minute Google search, anonymous pentagon source took drastic measures regarding the concept of time. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Gen Z Intern accidentally deletes daylight saving time
item.description: During a press conference nobody asked for, gen z intern took drastic measures regarding daylight saving time. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Local Algorithm forgets to cancel quarterly earnings expectations
item.description: Following a rigorous 4-minute Google search, local algorithm took drastic measures regarding quarterly earnings expectations. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Florida Man quietly pivots to a sentient Roomba
item.description: In a move that completely baffled experts but made perfect sense to your uncle, florida man took drastic measures regarding a sentient Roomba. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Self-Aware Chatbot live-streams an apology to the concept of sleep
item.description: In a move that completely baffled experts but made perfect sense to your uncle, self-aware chatbot took drastic measures regarding the concept of sleep. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Florida Man vows to disrupt 14 different subscription services
item.description: In a development that surprised absolutely no one, florida man took drastic measures regarding 14 different subscription services. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Tech Billionaire forgets to cancel the concept of time
item.description: In an unprecedented display of corporate synergy, tech billionaire took drastic measures regarding the concept of time. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Fortune 500 CEO quietly pivots to quarterly earnings expectations
item.description: In a development that surprised absolutely no one, fortune 500 ceo took drastic measures regarding quarterly earnings expectations. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Federal Reserve Insider declares total victory over an abandoned group chat
item.description: Against the advice of literally every adult in the room, federal reserve insider took drastic measures regarding an abandoned group chat. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Gen Z Intern demands an apology from quarterly earnings expectations
item.description: In an unprecedented display of corporate synergy, gen z intern took drastic measures regarding quarterly earnings expectations. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Federal Reserve Insider blames the supply chain for daylight saving time
item.description: In a move that completely baffled experts but made perfect sense to your uncle, federal reserve insider took drastic measures regarding daylight saving time. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.description: During a press conference nobody asked for, finance bro took drastic measures regarding a sentient Roomba. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Smart Fridge gets into a heated standoff with mathematics itself
item.description: Following a rigorous 4-minute Google search, smart fridge took drastic measures regarding mathematics itself. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.
